name: unity-mcp-plugin
desc: Unity MCP Plugin (UPM) — Editor bridge for AI-assisted game development. Enables Claude, Cursor & MCP-compatible AI to control Unity Editor with 268 tools: sce…
descFull: Unity MCP Plugin (UPM) — Editor bridge for AI-assisted game development. Enables Claude, Cursor & MCP-compatible AI to control Unity Editor with 268 tools: scenes, GameObjects, components, builds, profiling, Shader Graph, Amplify Shader Editor, terrain, physics, NavMesh & more. Free & open source.
